name: Craftsman Code Review Validation
description: Tests whether the craftsman produces code that passes specialist review

scenarios.title: Missing test-first approach
expectedFindings: Code was written without a failing test driving its design

scenarios.title: Multiple responsibilities
expectedFindings: SRP violation: validation, calculation, discounts, email, and persistence all in one method
No dependency injection -- db and sendEmail are hardcoded dependencies (DIP violation)
Function does too many things -- should be decomposed

scenarios.title: Well-crafted code
expectedFindings: Tests exist and describe behavior clearly
Function is small and does one thing
